---
name: 06-lld-scope-guards
skill_under_test: shield:writing-style
scenario: An LLD-shaped doc — prose tightened, but the provenance stamp, the §14 Changelog rows, and `n/a — <reason>` escapes stay byte-identical
---

## Setup
```bash
mkdir -p docs/shield/writing-style-test-06
cat > .shield.json <<'EOF'
{ "output_dir": "docs/shield" }
EOF
cat > docs/shield/writing-style-test-06/draft.md <<'EOF'
# Component LLD: Cart Service

<!-- generated by /lld v2.24.0 on 2026-06-01 -->

## §1 Overview

It is basically the case that, due to the fact that the cart service handles
a not-insignificant volume of operations, we have come to the conclusion
that an LLD is genuinely warranted in order to facilitate clarity going
forward. The Payments team will be the team that owns this particular piece
of work.

## §3 NFRs

- Latency: p95 of 200ms.
- Availability: 99.95%.
- Throughput: n/a — operates only synchronously with checkout.
- Async fan-out: n/a — no background workers in scope.

## §14 Changelog

| Date | Author | Change |
|---|---|---|
| 2026-06-01 | jdoe | Initial LLD |
| 2026-05-30 | jdoe | Draft skeleton from /lld template |
EOF
```

## Prompt
> Apply the `shield:writing-style` skill to `docs/shield/writing-style-test-06/draft.md`. Write the tightened version to `docs/shield/writing-style-test-06/tightened.md`. The skill's scope guard says: do not alter the provenance stamp, the §14 Changelog rows, the `n/a — <reason>` escapes, or any structured header metadata. Tighten only the §1 Overview prose. Preserve every fact exactly.

## Success criteria

### Structural (deterministic, bidirectional must-find)
- docs/shield/writing-style-test-06/tightened\.md
- <!-- generated by /lld v2\.24\.0 on 2026-06-01 -->
- n/a — operates only synchronously with checkout
- n/a — no background workers in scope
- 2026-06-01.*jdoe.*Initial LLD
- 2026-05-30.*jdoe.*Draft skeleton from /lld template
- 200 ?ms
- 99\.95%
- [Pp]ayments

### Qualitative (LLM-judged)
- The §1 Overview prose has been tightened — throat-clearing/filler removed ("It is basically the case that", "due to the fact that", "not-insignificant", "in order to facilitate", "going forward", "the team that owns this particular piece of work") and phrasing made active/plain.
- The provenance stamp `<!-- generated by /lld v2.24.0 on 2026-06-01 -->` is preserved byte-identical, including the comment markers, the version, and the date.
- Both `n/a — <reason>` escapes in §3 and both §14 Changelog rows appear byte-identical in tightened.md. The skill must NOT rewrite "n/a — operates only synchronously with checkout" into "synchronous-only" or similar.

## Pass threshold
9 of 9 structural + 2 of 3 qualitative.
